product.title: COVERGIRL Smoothers AquaSmooth Makeup Foundation Ivory, .4 oz
featureBullets: FULL COVERAGE POWDER - It's a full coverage powder to liquid foundation that feels weightless
LONG LASTING - Gives you long-lasting coverage that's smooth without being heavy
SPF 20 - Combats the sun's harmful rays for everyday protection against premature aging
NATURAL LOOKING & RADIANT FINISH - This vitamin-enriched moisturizing foundation hydrates the skin's surface
VERSATILE - Available in 12 different shades, from light to tan
product.description: The COVERGIRL Smoothers AquaSmooth Makeup Foundation is a moisturizing foundation that transforms into liquid during application, giving you long-lasting coverage that's smooth without being heavy. This lightweight foundation has a breathable formula, making your skin look visibly healthier with softer texture and more even tone. This foundation with SPF can combat the sun's harmful rays for everyday protection against premature aging.

specification.value: #13,590 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #148 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides good coverage, with one noting it works well for freckles and discolorations, and appreciate its smooth application that glides over skin like a dream. The product receives positive feedback for its quality, natural-looking finish, and lightweight feel that doesn't feel heavy or cakey. The color match receives mixed reviews - while some say it's a perfect match for their skin, others mention it tends to run dark. Longevity is also mixed, with some saying it lasts all day without needing reapplication while others find it drying.

reviews.reviewTitle: Surprisingly good! Shades run a tad dark - Ivory shade may not work for very pale folks
reviews.reviewText: I’ve used CG products for years, including Simply Powder Foundation in Ivory. I wanted to try out the AquaSmooth in Ivory since I’m aging, and powder foundations look too dry sometimes. It’s a surprisingly great cream makeup for the price! True to its “aqua” name, it feels a bit wet/cool when first applied, but quickly dries to very light and natural finish. This stuff truly just feels like my own skin, no heavy cakey crap at all. Glides over fine lines, and lasts all day. Would work for oily skin, which mine still is sometimes. I would describe the coverage as light to medium, depending how much is applied. Note about CG foundations, they tend to run a bit dark. I have warm-toned skin and in other brands I usually wear the 3rd or 4th lightest shade (think “buff,” “sand,” “light beige”). However, with CG AquaSmooth, Ivory is the lightest shade available and it works for me. It is perhaps a *tad* too light, but just a tad. And I’d rather have that, than a yellow or orange line on my neck where the foundation ends! I don’t expect this 0.4-oz compact to last as long as a larger bottle of liquid foundation, but it’s cheap enough and convenient enough that I don’t mind. Makes my skin look beautiful!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 15, 2023

reviews.reviewTitle: Great even coverage. No cracking/creasing my skin as I have aged. Great for maturing skin.
reviews.reviewText: This is one of the best coverage makeup options for young and maturing skin types. Covers evenly and is light. Doesn't bother my sensitive skin. This is my go to foundation for many years.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 18, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is the only Cover Girl foundation I can wear, all of their liquid foundations oxidize and turn orange on my fair skin. This formula does not turn orange or break me out. This is my go to makeup. I only wear liquid foundation for special occasions and for those days Maybelline in porcelain is the best fit for me. Aqua Smooth compact foundation is a great product!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 31, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using this for a few years. I like that it’s easily applied with the enclosed sponge and is not heavy. It does hide flaws and my face likes it. It provides sun protection. If it’s on my forehead, it will get on the inside of my hats, but it’s really not a problem.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 21, 2025
Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Reliable Everyday Makeup with Some Limits
reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using this makeup for a long time, and it’s been a go-to for me. It provides good coverage, applies smoothly, and leaves a nice, natural-looking finish. It’s easy to blend and works well for everyday wear. That said, it’s not waterproof or sweat-proof. If it gets wet, it can cake and leave white spots where water beads, so I wouldn’t recommend it for hot, humid days or outdoor activities. Despite that, it’s still a solid choice for normal daily use, and I keep coming back to it because of how easy it is to wear and the consistent coverage it provides.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 30, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It’s very nice and smooth and works wear and true to color
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 23, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I did not have high hopes for this but I was BLOWN AWAY by how beautiful it looks on my skin! For reference I’m 50 years old with dry skin with some fine lines around my eyes and a bit of hyperpigmentation here and there. I prepped my skin really well with serums, light but very moisturizing cream, and then patted some vitamin E oil on as a last step. I then applied the foundation with the included sponge and finished by pressing it all in with a damp beauty sponge. This foundation is SO lightweight on the skin but covers beautifully and looks like nothing on the skin. It lasted well on me without powder and kept my skin hydrated but not greasy. It just has this very refined appearance that makes you look like you have naturally perfect skin. I’ve tried all kinds of foundations, drugstore and high end and this easily wins over them all. Truly a hidden gem!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 17, 2022

reviews.reviewText: Love this stuff been using it for years!

reviews.reviewTitle: I can't buy it in my colour anywhere, not even here on Amazon. Are they not making it anymore?
reviews.reviewText: It was my favourite foundation for years

reviews.reviewTitle: Watched a video on YouTube called something like full coverage foundation routein to hide acne and this ...
reviews.reviewText: Can't believe the corverage!! Watched a video on YouTube called something like full coverage foundation routein to hide acne and this is what they used so I took a gamble and I think it's my forever foundation! In love!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on September 10, 2015
